compiled_state.title: Add configurable Conventional Commits enforcement to commit workflow
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Conventional Commits as an Explicit Convention

Activate mandates Conventional Commits (feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore) as part of AGENTS.md. DSO's commit workflow doesn't enforce a commit message format standard.

Add configurable commit message conventions to /dso:commit so that commit messages follow a consistent, parseable format. The convention should be:
- Configurable via dso-config.conf (e.g., commit.convention=conventional-commits)
- Enforced at commit time (validation in the commit workflow, not just guidance)
- Default to Conventional Commits (feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore) but allow project-specific overrides
- Support optional scope (e.g., feat(auth): add login flow)
- Integrate with version bumping (feat → minor, fix → patch, BREAKING CHANGE → major)

Reference: https://www.conventionalcommits.org/
